center.name: 朝鲜海峡
center.summary: 朝鲜海峡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑林鸽，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in East Asia, occurring mainly on offshore islands of the Pacific's Korea Strait, Philippine Sea and East China Sea around Japan, Korea, China, and Taiwan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in East Asia, occurring mainly on offshore islands of the Pacific's Korea Strait, Philippine Sea and East China Sea around Japan, Korea, China, and Taiwan
